sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.prompt_addendum: Write 3-4 bullet points summarising the analyst meeting context. Focus on the sell-side view, rating trajectory, and key debate points. Be concise.

sections.title: Analyst Profile
content: Senior analyst, {coverage_years}y coverage, top-3 in sector.

sections.title: Debate Points
content: Is consensus too high for FY26?
Margin sustainability at current capex levels?

sections.title: Key Questions to Probe
fallback: What is your base-case revenue trajectory?
Where do you see the biggest downside risk?
sections.prompt_addendum: Write 5-6 questions to ask this sell-side analyst. Map each to a valuation or thesis driver. Cover: estimates, ratings, competitive positioning, and catalysts.

sections.title: Risk Factors to Monitor
sections.prompt_addendum: Write 3 bullet points on risks from the analyst's perspective. Be specific.

sections.title: Quoted View
fallback: Constructive on AI capex; cautious on consumer hardware cycle.
sections.prompt_addendum: Write a 2-3 sentence summary of the analyst's key view on this stock and sector. Be factual.
